# Selva -- Full Reference

> Gamified multi-agent business orchestration platform
> Part of the MADFAM ecosystem (Janua, Dhanam, Enclii)

## Project Structure

```
selva/
  .github/workflows/        CI/CD pipelines
    ci.yml                   Main CI (lint, typecheck, test, build, security)
    deploy-enclii.yml        Docker build + push + Enclii lifecycle callback
    lint.yml                 Fast lint-only for PRs
  apps/
    nexus-api/               FastAPI central API (Python 3.12)
      src/
        main.py              App entry point, mounts routers
        auth.py              Janua JWT validation dependency
        config.py            Pydantic settings from env vars
        database.py          SQLAlchemy async engine + session
        models.py            ORM models (Department, Agent, ApprovalRequest, SwarmTask, ComputeTokenLedger)
        ws.py                WebSocket ConnectionManager singleton
        routers/
          agents.py          CRUD for swarm agents
          approvals.py       Approval request management + WebSocket
          billing.py         Dhanam billing integration
          departments.py     CRUD for departments
          health.py          Health and readiness probes
          swarms.py          Task dispatch and monitoring
    office-ui/               Next.js 14 + Phaser 3 spatial UI
      src/
        app/page.tsx         Root page component
        app/layout.tsx       Root layout with providers
        game/PhaserGame.tsx  Phaser game wrapper component
        game/scenes/         Phaser scenes (BootScene, OfficeScene)
        middleware.ts        Janua session validation
    colyseus/                Colyseus game state server
      src/index.ts           Server entry point and room definitions
    gateway/                 OpenClaw heartbeat daemon
      src/
        index.ts             Gateway entry point
        heartbeat.ts         30-minute cron job for proactive agent wakeups
        memory.ts            Markdown persistence (MEMORY.md, SOUL.md)
    workers/                 LangGraph task execution workers
  packages/
    shared-types/            TypeScript type definitions
      src/
        agent.ts             AgentRole, AgentStatus, Agent, SynergyBonus
        approval.ts          PermissionLevel, ActionCategory, ApprovalRequest, ApprovalResponse, PermissionMatrix
        billing.ts           ComputeTokenBucket, SubscriptionTier, TierCapabilities
        office.ts            Department, ReviewStation, TacticianPosition, OfficeState, GamepadInput
    ui/                      Shared React components
      src/
        agent-card.tsx       Agent info card component
        approval-modal.tsx   HITL approval modal component
        button.tsx           Base button component
    config/                  Shared ESLint and TypeScript configs
    orchestrator/            Swarm orchestration engine (Python)
      src/
        orchestrator.py      Main orchestrator class
        draft.py             Agent drafting logic
        synergy.py           Auto Chess synergy calculator
        compute_tokens.py    Compute token budget management
        types.py             AgentRole, AgentStatus, AgentConfig, SwarmTask, DepartmentConfig
        roles/
          definitions.py     RoleDefinition for each AgentRole (tools, permissions)
    permissions/             HITL permission engine (Python)
      src/
        types.py             PermissionLevel, ActionCategory, PermissionResult
        matrix.py            DEFAULT_PERMISSION_MATRIX
        classifier.py        Action classification logic
        engine.py            Permission evaluation engine
    inference/               LLM provider abstraction (Python)
      src/
        base.py              Abstract provider interface
        router.py            Model routing logic
        types.py             Inference request/response types
        providers/
          anthropic.py       Claude provider
          openai.py          OpenAI provider
          openrouter.py      OpenRouter provider
          ollama.py          Local Ollama provider
          generic.py         Generic OpenAI-compatible provider
  infra/
    docker/
      Dockerfile.nexus-api   Python FastAPI container
      Dockerfile.office-ui   Next.js container with build args
      Dockerfile.colyseus    Node.js Colyseus container
      docker-compose.yml     Infrastructure only (Postgres + Redis)
      docker-compose.dev.yml Full stack with all services
    k8s/
      base/                  Kustomize base (namespace)
      production/            Production overlays (deployments, configmaps, secrets)
  scripts/
    setup.sh                 First-time dev environment setup
    seed-agents.py           Seed departments, agents, permissions, synergies
```

## API Endpoints

All endpoints are prefixed with `/api/v1` unless noted.

### Health

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| GET | /health | No | Liveness probe (always 200) |
| GET | /ready | No | Readiness probe (checks DB + Redis, returns 503 if degraded) |

### Agents

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| GET | /agents/ | Yes | List all agents (optional ?department_id filter) |
| POST | /agents/ | Yes | Create (draft) a new agent |
| GET | /agents/{id} | Yes | Get agent by ID |
| PUT | /agents/{id} | Yes | Update agent fields |
| POST | /agents/{id}/assign | Yes | Assign agent to a department |
| DELETE | /agents/{id} | Yes | Delete an agent |

### Departments

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| GET | /departments/ | Yes | List all departments |
| POST | /departments/ | Yes | Create a department (slug must be unique) |
| GET | /departments/{id} | Yes | Get department with agent list |
| PUT | /departments/{id} | Yes | Update department fields |

### Approvals

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| GET | /approvals/ | Yes | List pending approval requests |
| POST | /approvals/{id}/approve | Yes | Approve a pending request |
| POST | /approvals/{id}/deny | Yes | Deny with optional feedback |
| WS | /approvals/ws | No | Real-time approval event stream |

### Swarms

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| POST | /swarms/dispatch | Yes | Dispatch a task to the swarm |
| GET | /swarms/tasks | Yes | List active tasks (queued/pending/running) |
| GET | /swarms/tasks/{id} | Yes | Get task by ID |

### Billing

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| GET | /billing/status | Yes | Current subscription status (via Dhanam) |
| GET | /billing/usage | Yes | Compute token usage for billing period |
| GET | /billing/tokens | Yes | Current token bucket state |

## Key Types

### Python (packages/orchestrator/src/types.py)

```python
class AgentRole(str, Enum):
    PLANNER = "planner"
    CODER = "coder"
    REVIEWER = "reviewer"
    RESEARCHER = "researcher"
    CRM = "crm"
    SUPPORT = "support"

class AgentStatus(str, Enum):
    IDLE = "idle"
    WORKING = "working"
    WAITING_APPROVAL = "waiting_approval"
    PAUSED = "paused"
    ERROR = "error"

class AgentConfig(BaseModel):
    id: str
    name: str
    role: AgentRole
    level: int  # 1-10
    department_id: str | None
    status: AgentStatus

class SwarmTask(BaseModel):
    id: str
    description: str
    assigned_agent_ids: list[str]
    graph_type: str  # sequential | parallel | coding | research | crm
    payload: dict
    status: str  # pending | queued | running | completed | failed
    created_at: datetime

class DepartmentConfig(BaseModel):
    id: str
    name: str
    slug: str
    max_agents: int
    agent_ids: list[str]
```

### Python (packages/permissions/src/types.py)

```python
class PermissionLevel(str, Enum):
    ALLOW = "allow"
    ASK = "ask"
    DENY = "deny"

class ActionCategory(str, Enum):
    FILE_READ = "file_read"
    FILE_WRITE = "file_write"
    BASH_EXECUTE = "bash_execute"
    GIT_COMMIT = "git_commit"
    GIT_PUSH = "git_push"
    EMAIL_SEND = "email_send"
    CRM_UPDATE = "crm_update"
    DEPLOY = "deploy"
    API_CALL = "api_call"

class PermissionResult(BaseModel):
    action_category: ActionCategory
    level: PermissionLevel
    requires_approval: bool
    reason: str
```

### TypeScript (packages/shared-types)

```typescript
type AgentRole = 'planner' | 'coder' | 'reviewer' | 'researcher' | 'crm' | 'support';
type AgentStatus = 'idle' | 'working' | 'waiting_approval' | 'paused' | 'error';
type PermissionLevel = 'allow' | 'ask' | 'deny';
type ActionCategory = 'file_read' | 'file_write' | 'bash_execute' | 'git_commit'
    | 'git_push' | 'email_send' | 'crm_update' | 'deploy' | 'api_call';

interface Agent {
    id: string; name: string; role: AgentRole; status: AgentStatus;
    level: number; departmentId: string | null; currentTaskId: string | null;
    synergyBonuses: SynergyBonus[]; createdAt: string; updatedAt: string;
}

interface SynergyBonus {
    name: string; description: string;
    multiplier: number; requiredRoles: AgentRole[];
}

interface ApprovalRequest {
    id: string; agentId: string; agentName: string;
    actionCategory: ActionCategory; actionType: string;
    payload: Record<string, unknown>; diff?: string;
    reasoning: string; urgency: 'low' | 'medium' | 'high' | 'critical';
    createdAt: string;
}

interface ApprovalResponse {
    requestId: string; result: 'approved' | 'denied';
    feedback?: string; respondedAt: string;
}

interface Department {
    id: string; name: string; slug: string; description: string;
    agents: Agent[]; maxAgents: number; position: { x: number; y: number };
}

interface GamepadInput {
    leftStickX: number; leftStickY: number;
    rightStickX: number; rightStickY: number;
    buttonA: boolean; buttonB: boolean;
    buttonX: boolean; buttonY: boolean;
}

interface OfficeState {
    departments: Department[]; reviewStations: ReviewStation[];
    tactician: TacticianPosition; activeAgentCount: number;
    pendingApprovalCount: number;
}

type SubscriptionTier = 'starter' | 'professional' | 'enterprise';

interface ComputeTokenBucket {
    dailyLimit: number; used: number;
    remaining: number; resetAt: string;
}

interface TierCapabilities {
    tier: SubscriptionTier; maxAgents: number;
    maxDepartments: number; dailyComputeTokens: number;
    maxConcurrentTasks: number; features: string[];
}
```

## WebSocket Messages

### Connection

Connect to `ws://localhost:4300/api/v1/approvals/ws?client_id=<uuid>`

### Server -> Client

```json
// New approval request from an agent
{
    "type": "approval_request",
    "data": {
        "id": "<uuid>",
        "agent_id": "<uuid>",
        "action_category": "git_push",
        "action_type": "push_to_main",
        "payload": {"branch": "feat/x", "commits": 3},
        "diff": "--- a/file\n+++ b/file\n...",
        "reasoning": "All tests pass.",
        "urgency": "medium",
        "created_at": "2026-03-06T14:30:00Z"
    }
}

// Approval decision was made
{
    "type": "approval_response",
    "data": {
        "id": "<uuid>",
        "status": "approved",
        "feedback": null,
        "responded_at": "2026-03-06T14:31:15Z"
    }
}

// Keep-alive pong
{"type": "pong"}
```

### Client -> Server

```json
// Keep-alive ping
"ping"
```

## Redis Task Stream Format

Tasks are enqueued via `XADD selva:task-stream * data <json>` and consumed
by workers via `XREADGROUP` with consumer group `selva-workers`.

```json
{
    "task_id": "<uuid>",
    "graph_type": "parallel",
    "description": "Integrate payment gateway",
    "assigned_agent_ids": ["<uuid>", "<uuid>"],
    "payload": {
        "repo": "madfam-org/selva",
        "branch": "feat/payments"
    }
}
```

## JWT Claims (Janua)

```json
{
    "sub": "user_abc123",
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "roles": ["admin"],
    "org_id": "org_xyz789",
    "iss": "https://auth.example.com",
    "aud": "selva",
    "exp": 1741276800,
    "iat": 1741273200
}
```

## Environment Variables

| Variable | Default | Description |
|----------|---------|-------------|
| DATABASE_URL | postgresql://selva:autoswarm@localhost:5432/autoswarm | PostgreSQL connection |
| REDIS_URL | redis://localhost:6379 | Redis connection |
| JANUA_ISSUER_URL | (empty) | Janua OIDC issuer |
| JANUA_CLIENT_ID | selva | OIDC client ID |
| JANUA_CLIENT_SECRET | (empty) | OIDC client secret |
| NEXT_PUBLIC_JANUA_URL | (empty) | Client-side Janua URL |
| DHANAM_API_URL | https://api.dhan.am | Dhanam billing API |
| DHANAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET | (empty) | Dhanam webhook HMAC key |
| ANTHROPIC_API_KEY | (empty) | Anthropic Claude API key |
| OPENAI_API_KEY | (empty) | OpenAI API key |
| OPENROUTER_API_KEY | (empty) | OpenRouter API key |
| OLLAMA_BASE_URL | http://localhost:11434 | Local Ollama server |
| OPENCLAW_API_KEY | (empty) | OpenClaw gateway key |
| OPENCLAW_MEMORY_DIR | ./data/memory | Markdown memory directory |
| COLYSEUS_SECRET | change-me-in-production | Colyseus session secret |
| NEXUS_API_PORT | 4300 | Nexus API listen port |
| OFFICE_UI_PORT | 4301 | Office UI listen port |
| ADMIN_PORT | 4302 | Admin dashboard listen port |
| COLYSEUS_PORT | 4303 | Colyseus listen port |
| NPM_REGISTRY_TOKEN | (empty) | Private npm registry token |

## Synergy Rules

| Name | Required Roles | Multiplier |
|------|---------------|-----------|
| Surgical DevOps | researcher + coder | 1.30x |
| Full Stack Review | coder + reviewer | 1.25x |
| Strategic Planning | planner + researcher | 1.20x |
| Customer Intel | crm + support | 1.15x |
| War Room | planner + coder + reviewer | 1.50x |

Synergies stack multiplicatively. A department with planner + coder + reviewer
activates both "Full Stack Review" (1.25x) and "War Room" (1.50x) for a combined
effective multiplier of 1.875x.

## Default Permission Matrix

| Action | Level |
|--------|-------|
| file_read | allow |
| file_write | ask |
| bash_execute | ask |
| git_commit | ask |
| git_push | ask |
| email_send | ask |
| crm_update | ask |
| deploy | ask |
| api_call | allow |

## Ecosystem Services

- **Janua** (auth provider): OIDC identity provider. Provides @janua/nextjs-sdk for
  frontend session management and Python JWT validation for the API. Read the Janua
  llms-full.txt for complete API surface.

- **Dhanam** (billing provider): Billing and subscription management. Provides
  @dhanam/billing-sdk for usage tracking and tier enforcement. Read the Dhanam
  llms-full.txt for complete API surface.

- **Enclii** (deployment provider): Deployment orchestration. Watches GHCR for image
  pushes, manages ArgoCD rollouts. Configured via .enclii.yml. Read the Enclii
  llms-full.txt for complete API surface.
